items.caption: A pair of vintage golden studio microphones, each exhibiting a unique design. the microphones are set against a vibrant red background, which accentuates their golden hue. the microphones are positioned side by side, facing the viewer, allowing for a clear view of their intricate details. the background features a vibrant red color, and the microphones are positioned in a symmetrical composition.
A set of microphones on stands, ready for a press briefing in the rain.
